text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching for new recovery operations... Zero
results found.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Let's think up a plan to overcome this together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I apologize. My agitation seems to have
resulted in a processing error.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Recovery complete. I have recalled some
important information.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I remember that I have your support, and that
we've come so far together.
choice_data_list: Let's work extra hard starting tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I hit myself with great force in order to
become stimulated. Mode change successful.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Adversity brings strength. Never give up. If you
quit, then it's all over...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But it's not over for me. I will do my best while
"pumped"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, it looks like she's managed to move
on from her failure.
